purpose: Define the minimum concrete adapter contract for OpenClaw multi-agent collaboration infrastructure.
global_rules: OpenClaw main remains user-facing moderator, runtime-context owner, and acceptance gate.
External agents must be explicit participants with adapter status, permissions, artifacts, and blockers.
A participant is not considered integrated until probe/send/read have been demonstrated or a blocker is explicitly recorded.
No secrets/tokens may be read, copied, exported, or displayed by adapter probes.
No Telegram outbound, source edits, prompt/model/workflow changes, or external writes without explicit Alex approval.

adapter.probe_command: optional read-only probe command or script path
adapter.send_command: optional task send command or script path
adapter.read_command: optional result read command or script path
adapter.cancel_command: optional cancellation command or script path

blockers: exact blockers with remediation if known
safe_next_actions: actions that remain within read-only/safe scope

done_definition.adapter_probe_done: probe result exists with status and evidence
done_definition.participant_integrated: probe/send/read smoke succeeded with artifact path, or blocker is explicit and reproducible
done_definition.agent_room_ready: status classifier can report all participants without waking agents or sending Telegram
